#### Slides Spring 2026

[Chapter 1](latex/Chapter01.pdf)
<br>[Chapter 2](latex/Chapter02.pdf)
<br>[Chapter 3](latex/Chapter03.pdf)
<br>[Chapter 5](latex/Chapter05.pdf)
<br>[Chapter 6](latex/Chapter06.pdf)
<br>[Chapter 4](latex/Chapter04.pdf)
<br>[Chapter 7](latex/Chapter07.pdf)
<br>[Chapter 12](latex/Chapter12.pdf)
<br>[Chapter 13](latex/Chapter13.pdf)
<br>[Chapter 14](latex/Chapter14.pdf)
<br>[Chapter 15](latex/Chapter15.pdf)
<br>[Chapter 19](latex/Chapter19.pdf)
<br>[Principal Components and Factor Models](latex/PCA_Factors.pdf)
